text: Access Tools Wheel Bullets are designed to hold the wheel in place while working on European
vehicles that lack the wheel studs that American vehicles have. Wheel Bullets are guide pin wheel
hangers designed to aid in the safe and effective removal and installation of wheels on European
vehicles. Never drop, damage, or scratch an expensive wheel again. Eliminate the risk of
injury. Simply remove the top two wheel bolts from the wheel on the vehicle. Thread two wheel
bullets into the hub through the wheel where the bolt was. Continue to remove the remaining
wheel bolts and allow the wheel to rest on the wheel bullets. The wheel bullets will hold the
wheel in place while working on the wheel. If you need to remove the wheel bolts, you can do so by
pulling the wheel in place, keeping it safe from damage and you safe from injury. Remove the wheel
safely by sliding it off the wheel bullets. To reinstall the wheel, use the wheel bullets to
help guide the wheel into place on the vehicle. Thread the wheel bolts into the hub through the
wheel, securing the wheel to the vehicle. Remove the wheel bullets from the vehicle and thread in
the last two bolts, tightening them properly according to manufacturer specifications.
Made of heavy duty anodized aluminum with a knurled handle for easy installation and removal.
Two wheel bullets are needed per wheel or eight per vehicle for any full vehicle maintenance.
There are two 14 millimeter sizes and one 12 millimeter size to fit virtually all European
vehicles as well as some American vehicles. The six pack is perfect for the road service
professional, tow truck driver, at home mechanic, or DIY individual. The 24 pack is perfect for the
professional mechanic or automotive enthusiast. The included application chart features Audi,
Volkswagen, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Volvo, Porsche, Mini Cooper, Smart, Saab, Fiat, and more.
